features.featureTitle: Update the default WhatsApp reminder message template used by the "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" action so the message starts with a greeting and includes the selected customer’s name and formatted outstanding balance amount, using this exact template text (with placeholders replaced at runtime): "नमस्कार (Customer Name) आपली खाते बाकी लवकरात लवकर जमा करून सहकार्य करावे. (Outstanding Balance)".
